basics.name: Maria Fernanda
basics.label: Programmer
basics.summary: Developer focused on building software with intention and technical depth. I practice TDD because I believe code should be reliable before it is fast. I'm continuously learning, strengthening core fundamentals, and exploring how to integrate AI into real-world solutions — not as a trend, but as a strategic tool. Outside of tech, I read fantasy and firmly believe New Super Mario Bros on Nintendo Switch is the best stress ❤️ reliever.

work.name: Corteva Agriscience
work.summary: I develop business applications using Power Apps and Dataverse to digitalize and optimize internal processes. I design interactive Power BI reports for data analysis and visualization, and implement automations with Power Automate to improve operational efficiency. I also perform data analysis to support data-driven decision-making.

work.name: Syngenta
work.summary: Developed and optimized SQL queries and database structures, designing tables and relationships to support business requirements. Built a REST API in PHP to expose structured data and integrated it with Power BI reports to enable data visualization and analysis.
highlights: Reduced manual reporting processes by centralizing data access through a REST API consumed by Power BI dashboards.
